note: Deck-style segment battles (modeled on 'Competitive Landscape - December 2024.pptx'). Ratings: good | soso | bad, from Cardo's perspective, based on agent research + review consensus as of July 2026. Dimension sub-criteria mirror the internal deck.

dimensions_legend.Ease of Use: Wheel, cradle, mount, voice commands, screen, OTA
dimensions_legend.Intercom: Range, # riders, mesh, auto-reconnect, WB sound
dimensions_legend.Quality: Build quality, service, IP65/IP67, water resistance

battles.title: SPIRIT vs competition
battles.exec_summary: Spirit still anchors the range on brand trust and OTA support, but at this price point ASMAX now sells MESH with an offline AI assistant and a published waterproof rating — a spec sheet Spirit cannot match. Sena 5R LITE matches Spirit's simplicity $10 cheaper. The entry tier is defended by distribution and brand, not by product.

matchups.blurb: Sena's lowest-profile entry unit; basic 2-rider Bluetooth, water-resistant.
Mesh + BT 5.4 dual-chip, offline 'Hi Max' AI voice, IPX7, FOTA — flagship-class spec at the cheapest price in the market.
Bluetooth entry model sold via SEA dealers; specs opaque, not on the US store.

rows.note: 5R LITE slimmest; Spirit dated but compact; S1 41 g
Spirit: app + OTA; S1: AI voice + app; 5R LITE basic 3-button
Spirit 32mm generic vs S1 40mm; both non-HD
Only S1 has mesh (8 riders); Spirit/5R LITE 2-rider BT
No published IP on Spirit; S1 IPX7 but young-brand QC; Lite unknown
Spirit most expensive in segment

battles.title: SPIRIT HD vs competition
battles.exec_summary: Spirit HD's 40mm HD speakers and sound profiles carry it against Sena's aging 5-series, but Sena discounts aggressively ($135 for the 5S with LCD screen) and ASMAX Z1 sells mesh at half the price. HD audio is the story; price is the exposure.

matchups.blurb: Entry unit with integrated LCD screen and jog dial; currently 20% off on Sena's store.
Slim 3-button 4-rider Bluetooth unit, reviewed as strong value (Ultimate Motorcycling).
Mid-positioned mesh unit with 40mm HiFi speakers and claimed 160 km/h voice clarity, sold at entry price.
cardo_advantage: Brand trust, dealer network, proven firmware
competitor_advantage: MESH at half the price (10 riders)
to_test: Range claims (15 km chained marketing vs reality)

rows.note: 5R slimmest; Z1 magnetic mount
5S LCD + jog dial; Spirit HD app + OTA; Z1 voice
Spirit HD 40mm HD + profiles; Z1 40mm HiFi
Z1 mesh 10 riders; 5R pairs 4; Spirit HD/5S 2-rider
No published IP on Spirit HD or 5-series; Z1 IP67 but QC unknowns
Spirit HD most expensive in segment at $179.95

battles.title: FREECOM 2X vs competition
battles.exec_summary: Freecom 2x sells premium 2-rider Bluetooth with JBL sound — but Sena's Spider RT1 offers 24-rider MESH for $11 less and ASMAX Future 1 brings mesh + AI at $155. A 2-rider BT unit above $200 is structurally hard to defend in 2026; JBL audio and Live Intercom UX are the remaining pillars.

matchups.blurb: Affordable Mesh 2.0-only unit (24 riders, 8 km multi-hop). Successor Spider X Slim with Mesh 3.0 announced at EICMA 2025.
2025 EICMA model: mesh, neural-network noise filtering, AI voice, 1350 mAh, IPX7 — 'high-tech at an affordable price' per Asian reviewers.
cardo_advantage: Western retail availability (Future 1 not on US store yet)

rows.note: Freecom slim; Future 1 50 g magnetic
Natural Voice + OTA vs Spider's app issues; Future 1 AI voice
JBL 40mm vs Spider standard HD; Future 1 tuned 40mm
2-rider BT vs 24-rider mesh; Future 1 mesh but brand-locked
Freecom 'waterproof' unrated officially; Spider durability complaints; ASMAX QC young
Most expensive, least intercom capability in segment

battles.title: FREECOM 4X vs competition
battles.exec_summary: The 4-rider Freecom 4x holds the 'premium Bluetooth' niche on JBL sound and polish, but its price now overlaps Sena's mesh-capable 50R (~$300) and doubles ASMAX's F1 Pro (~$205, mesh + Bongiovi audio). The 2025 MSRP hike ($269.95 → $314.95) made this segment position visibly worse.

matchups.blurb: Low-profile Mesh 2.0 unit with Harman Kardon audio — mesh capability at Freecom 4x money.
Octa-core mesh unit with Bongiovi 'Grammy-level' tuning, 14h intercom / 21h music, AI voice — not yet on the US store.

rows.note: 50R low-profile 3-button; 4x slim
Natural Voice + app polish; 50R aging UX; F1 Pro AI voice
JBL vs Harman Kardon wash; Bongiovi unproven in West
4-rider BT vs 24-rider mesh; F1 Pro 10-rider brand-locked mesh
4x IP65-ish unpublished; 50R water-resistant only; ASMAX QC young
2025 hike put 4x above a mesh-capable Sena

battles.title: PACKTALK NEO vs competition
battles.exec_summary: Neo delivers full DMC Gen2 (31 riders post Mesh-Boost) at $80 under the Edge — but Reso's Pilot Neo undercuts it by ~$90 with IP67, 24h battery and 3-yr warranty, and Sena's 50S adds Harman Kardon at $341. Neo wins on mesh reliability and ecosystem; it loses the pure value math. This is the deck's 2024 'Neo vs Pilot Pro' story repeating one tier down.

matchups.blurb: Aging Mesh 2.0 mid-tier with Harman Kardon speakers and jog dial; firmware v2.7 drew community backlash; refresh expected as 2026 range lands.
competitor_advantage: Jog dial preferred by some riders

matchups.blurb: Single-channel mesh (15 riders), IP67, 24h talk, 15W fast charge, 3-yr warranty — the sharpest value attack on the Neo.

matchups.price: $269 street (Malaysia dealer; not yet on US store)
matchups.blurb: EICMA 2025 top model: 45mm speakers, 1350 mAh, Bongiovi tuning — first confirmed price is well under the Neo.
competitor_advantage: $90 cheaper than Neo at confirmed SEA pricing

rows.note: 50S bulky (MCN); Neo clip-mount only (no Air Mount)
Natural Voice + OTA; 50S firmware backlash; Reso voice praised
JBL vs HK; Reso self-developed (good reviews, less brand)
DMC 31 riders benchmark; 50S mesh dropouts; Reso 15, brand-locked
Neo IP67 2-yr; 50S water-resistant; Reso IP67 3-yr but young brand
Neo most expensive mid-mesh; Reso $269 defines segment value

battles.title: PACKTALK PRO / EDGE vs competition
battles.exec_summary: Cardo still owns the reliability crown — DMC, IP67, crash detection, and nearly every 'best overall' verdict. But the price umbrella is under attack from three directions: Sena 60S EVO ($459) with Bose audio + lifetime warranty, Reso Pilot Pro ($359) matching the safety stack, and ASMAX F1s ($140) resetting the price floor. Wave/CloudTalk-style cellular intercom is the marketing capability gap; the 2025 MSRP hikes are the self-inflicted one.

matchups.blurb: May 2026 flagship: Sound by Bose, Mesh 3.0 + Wave cellular intercom, 27h talk, IPX7, limited lifetime warranty. MCN: 'considerably cheaper than Cardo's flagship'.
competitor_advantage: Wave = unlimited range over LTE (headline feature)
to_test: EVO AI noise cancellation at speed (60S version underperformed >80 km/h)

matchups.blurb: Launched July 2, 2026: Sena's first joystick-controlled intercom, replacing the jog dial with glove-friendly buttons, plus magnetic mount with Qi wireless charging, Sound by Bose, Mesh 3.0/Wave, and a limited lifetime warranty — same price as the 60S EVO.
cardo_advantage: Proven Natural Voice + Air Mount UX
competitor_advantage: Joystick control pitched as easier with gloves than Cardo's wheel
to_test: Joystick usability at speed/in gloves vs Cardo's control wheel
Real-world Bose audio verdict once reviewed

matchups.blurb: 2024 flagship now discounted ~20% as EVO lands — price pressure directly on the Edge.
Ex-DJI team: DuoSync hardware+software mesh (30 riders), GNSS crash SOS, 'Hey RESO', GoPro/DJI/Insta360 audio-in-footage, IP67, 3-yr warranty.
The price-floor reset: mesh + offline AI voice + IP67 + FOTA at 28% of Packtalk Pro's price. Range claims don't survive testing, but the value optics damage the whole premium tier.

rows.note: Air Mount + slim vs Sena bulk (MCN); 60X slimmer horizontal magnetic module; Pilot Pro DJI-grade design

45mm JBL (Pro) vs Bose (EVO/60X) vs HK (60S); Reso good but less brand
DMC benchmark; Sena adds Wave unlimited-range; Reso small base; F1s real range ~1 km
IP67 + 3yr vs IPX7 + lifetime (EVO/60X); 60S firmware bugs; young brands unproven
Pro most expensive on market post-2025 hikes; 60S EVO/60X/60S/Reso/ASMAX all undercut
